scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,worker,web,admin -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @szrouter/gateway" "npm run dev -w @szrouter/worker" "npm run dev -w @szrouter/web" "npm run dev -w @szrouter/admin"
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @szrouter/database && npm run build -w @szrouter/gateway && npm run build -w @szrouter/worker && npm run build -w @szrouter/web && npm run build -w @szrouter/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @szrouter/database && npm run typecheck -w @szrouter/gateway && npm run typecheck -w @szrouter/worker && npm run typecheck -w @szrouter/web && npm run typecheck -w @szrouter/admin
scripts.db:push: prisma db push --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run db:sql
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
